title: so + adj./adv. + that + 子句

formulas.zh: 如此……以致於……；表示程度如此之深，導致某種結果發生

formulas.formula: so + adj./adv. + that + S + V(結果)
formulas.zh: 強調原因的程度，導致後面子句的結果

explanation: 此句型用於表達因果關係，強調前半部分的程度之深足以引起後半部分的結果。so 後接形容詞或副詞修飾程度，that 引導結果子句。與 such 的區別在於：so 接形容詞或副詞，such 接名詞片語（如 such a big house）。常見於描述令人驚訝、困難或極端的情況。注意 so...that 中的結果子句通常使用簡單式，有時帶有否定意涵。

examples.eng: The movie was so interesting that we watched it twice.
examples.chi: 這部電影非常有趣，以至於我們看了兩遍。

examples.eng: She spoke so quickly that I couldn't understand what she said.
examples.chi: 她說得如此快速，以至於我無法理解她的意思。

examples.eng: The weather was so bad that the game was cancelled.
examples.chi: 天氣極為惡劣，以至於比賽被取消了。

examples.eng: He was so tired that he fell asleep during the lecture.
examples.chi: 他累得如此厲害，以至於在講座中睡著了。

extension.tip: 判斷要點：so 後必接形容詞或副詞，不能接名詞。若要修飾名詞，改用 such。常見錯誤是混淆 so 與 such 的使用對象。記住：so 修飾品質程度（形容詞/副詞），such 修飾名詞本身。結果子句往往帶有不預期或令人驚訝的涵義。

examples.test: ❌ The city is so large city that... vs ✓ The city is such a large city that...
examples.result: → 修飾名詞時用 such a/an + n，不用 so

examples.test: ❌ He ran so fast that he could catch... vs ✓ He ran so fast that he could catch the thief.
examples.result: → so + adv. 修飾動作方式，結果子句需完整

examples.test: ✓ The test was so difficult that many students failed. vs ✓ It was such a difficult test that many students failed.
examples.result: → 同義表達：so difficult that = such a difficult...that

extension.note: 口訣：『So 接詞（形容詞/副詞），Such 接詞組（名詞片語）』

parts: that I finished it in one day.
exercises.sentence: The book was so interesting that I finished it in one day.
exercises.translation: 這本書如此有趣，以至於我一天內就看完了。

exercises.sentence: She sang so beautifully that everyone stopped to listen.
exercises.translation: 她唱得如此優美，以至於每個人都停下來聽。

parts: that we needed expert help to solve it.
exercises.sentence: The problem was so complex that we needed expert help to solve it.
exercises.translation: 這個問題非常複雜，以至於我們需要專家的幫助才能解決。

parts: that her mother couldn't calm her down.
exercises.sentence: The baby cried so loudly that her mother couldn't calm her down.
exercises.translation: 嬰兒哭得如此大聲，以至於她的母親無法讓她平靜下來。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填空白，使句子表達「如此...以至於...」的結果
mc_exercises.question_eng: The weather was _______ hot that we decided to stay indoors all day.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（so）。此句型為「so + 形容詞 + that + 結果子句」，so 後接形容詞 hot。B（such）後應接名詞片語，不適用；C（very）無因果結構；D（too）表「過度」但無 that 子句搭配。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填空白，完成「如此快速...以至於...」的句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: He ran _______ fast that no one could catch up with him.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B（so）。因為 fast 是副詞，應使用「so + 副詞 + that」結構。A（such）用於名詞片語；C（rather）和 D（quite）為程度副詞但無因果關係結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填空白，表達結果的適當詞彙，使句意完整
mc_exercises.question_eng: The test was _______ difficult that many students _______ pass it on their first attempt.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。「so + difficult + that」為正確句型，結果子句應為 couldn't pass（無法通過），表因難度高而失敗。A 的 could 意思相反；C 的 such 後應接名詞片語；D 的 very 無因果結構，且 didn't 時態使用不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填空白，完成複雜因果句，注意句型和時態搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: The presentation was _______ well-organized and comprehensive _______ it impressed all the committee members, even those who were initially skeptical.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。well-organized 和 comprehensive 為形容詞複合修飾，應使用「so + adj. + that」結構。A（such...that）用於名詞片語；C（so...as to）為不同句型結構；D（such a）後應接單數可數名詞，但 presentation 前已有冠詞 the，此結構不適用。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這部電影很有趣，以至於我們都笑了。
translation_exercises.answer: The movie was so funny that we all laughed.
hints: 句型框架：so + 形容詞 + that + S + V (結果)
注意：funny 是形容詞修飾程度，不能用 such；結果子句用簡單過去式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他講話這麼快，以至於我無法跟上他的意思。
translation_exercises.answer: He spoke so quickly that I couldn't follow what he said.
hints: 句型框架：so + 副詞 + that + S + V (結果)；副詞修飾動詞程度
注意：結果子句常帶否定意涵，使用 couldn't；不能用 such quickly

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 昨天的考試如此困難，以至於班上大多數同學都沒及格。
translation_exercises.answer: Yesterday's exam was so difficult that most students in the class didn't pass.
key_points: 主詞為 exam（單數），謂語為 was
hints: 句型框架：so + 形容詞 + that + S + V (結果)；強調程度之深導致後果
注意：difficult 是形容詞，不能改用 such；結果子句的主詞是 most students（複數），謂語應為 didn't pass

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她在演講中表現得如此出色，以至於評委決定給她頒發特別獎。
translation_exercises.answer: She performed so excellently in the speech that the judges decided to award her a special prize.
key_points: so + excellently (副詞修飾動詞 performed)
that + 複雜結果子句（含不定詞 to award）
hints: 句型框架：so + 副詞 + that + S + V (結果)；結果子句可包含不定詞結構
注意：excellently 是副詞修飾動詞程度；to award 為不定詞，表示判斷後的行動；avoid 混淆 such + 名詞片語
